channel.title: राजनीतिशास्त्र — Political Science in Nepali
channel.description: नेपाली भाषामा राजनीतिशास्त्रको विस्तृत व्याख्या। विद्यार्थीहरूको लागि सरल र शैक्षिक पोडकास्ट। हरेक दिन नयाँ एपिसोड।
channel.itunes:author: Abishek Lakandri

item.title: Non-Alignment, Geopolitics & Nepal
item.description: The Non-Aligned Movement (NAM) emerged during the Cold War when the world was divided between the USA-led Western bloc and the USSR-led Eastern bloc. A group of newly independent nations refused to join either side. Founded in 1961 by:
item.itunes:title: Non-Alignment, Geopolitics & Nepal
item.itunes:summary: The Non-Aligned Movement (NAM) emerged during the Cold War when the world was divided between the USA-led Western bloc and the USSR-led Eastern bloc. A group of newly independent nations refused to join either side. Founded in 1961 by:

item.title: Feminism in Politics
item.description: Feminism (नारीवाद) is the political, social, and economic movement for equality between men and women. It holds that women have been systematically disadvantaged by patriarchal (पितृसत्तात्मक) systems and that political action is needed to achieve equality.
item.itunes:title: Feminism in Politics
item.itunes:summary: Feminism (नारीवाद) is the political, social, and economic movement for equality between men and women. It holds that women have been systematically disadvantaged by patriarchal (पितृसत्तात्मक) systems and that political action is needed to achieve equality.

item.title: Anarchism
item.description: Anarchism is the belief that all forms of hierarchical government are unnecessary and harmful. Society can organize itself through voluntary cooperation, mutual aid, and direct democracy without the state. Anarchism is NOT chaos — it is a structured vision of society without rulers.
item.itunes:title: Anarchism
item.itunes:summary: Anarchism is the belief that all forms of hierarchical government are unnecessary and harmful. Society can organize itself through voluntary cooperation, mutual aid, and direct democracy without the state. Anarchism is NOT chaos — it is a structured vision of society without rulers.

item.title: Theocracy, State Religion and Secularism
item.description: Theocracy (धर्मतन्त्र) is a system of government where **religious leaders or religious law serve as the supreme authority**. In a true theocracy, the head of state is a religious figure, and laws are derived from sacred texts rather than democratic legislation.
item.itunes:title: Theocracy, State Religion and Secularism
item.itunes:summary: Theocracy (धर्मतन्त्र) is a system of government where **religious leaders or religious law serve as the supreme authority**. In a true theocracy, the head of state is a religious figure, and laws are derived from sacred texts rather than democratic legislation.

item.title: Federalism
item.description: Federalism (संघीयवाद) is a system where power is divided between a central (federal) government and regional (state/provincial) governments. Each level has its own authority, laws, and institutions. The opposite is a unitary state where all power resides in the central government (like Nepal was before 2015).
item.itunes:title: Federalism
item.itunes:summary: Federalism (संघीयवाद) is a system where power is divided between a central (federal) government and regional (state/provincial) governments. Each level has its own authority, laws, and institutions. The opposite is a unitary state where all power resides in the central government (like Nepal was before 2015).

item.title: Social Democracy
item.description: Social democracy sits between capitalism and socialism. It accepts:
item.itunes:title: Social Democracy
item.itunes:summary: Social democracy sits between capitalism and socialism. It accepts:

item.title: Socialism Marxism Communism
item.description: Chapter 3: Socialism, Marxism & Communism समाजवाद, मार्क्सवाद, साम्यवाद Glossary / शब्दकोश English Nepali Script Meaning Socialism Samajvaad समाजवाद Economic system with collective/state ownership; reduce inequality Communism Saamyavaad साम्यवाद Classless, stateless society; all property owned collectively Marxism Marxvaad मार्क्सवाद Philosophy of Karl Marx: class struggle, historical materialism Leninism Leninvaad लेनिनवाद Lenin’s adaptation: vanguard party leads revolution Maoism Maovaad माओवा
item.itunes:title: Socialism Marxism Communism
item.itunes:summary: Chapter 3: Socialism, Marxism & Communism समाजवाद, मार्क्सवाद, साम्यवाद Glossary / शब्दकोश English Nepali Script Meaning Socialism Samajvaad समाजवाद Economic system with collective/state ownership; reduce inequality Communism Saamyavaad साम्यवाद Classless, stateless society; all property owned collectively Marxism Marxvaad मार्क्सवाद Philosophy of Karl Marx: class struggle, historical materialism Leninism Leninvaad लेनिनवाद Lenin’s adaptation: vanguard party leads revolution Maoism Maovaad माओवा

item.title: What Is Politics What Is Ideology
item.description: Glossary / शब्दकोश English Term Nepali Term Nepali Script Meaning Politics Rajniti राजनीति The art and science of governance and power Ideology Vichaardhara विचारधारा A system of ideas and ideals forming the basis of political theory Government Sarkar सरकार The governing body of a state State Rajya राज्य A politically organized community under one government Power Shakti / Satta शक्ति / सत्ता Authority and ability to govern Revolution Kranti क्रान्ति Fundamental overthrow of a political system C
item.itunes:title: What Is Politics What Is Ideology
item.itunes:summary: Glossary / शब्दकोश English Term Nepali Term Nepali Script Meaning Politics Rajniti राजनीति The art and science of governance and power Ideology Vichaardhara विचारधारा A system of ideas and ideals forming the basis of political theory Government Sarkar सरकार The governing body of a state State Rajya राज्य A politically organized community under one government Power Shakti / Satta शक्ति / सत्ता Authority and ability to govern Revolution Kranti क्रान्ति Fundamental overthrow of a political system C
